sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n39998" key="e)pile/ansis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιλέ-ανσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n39998.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">chewing small, rumination</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τροφῆς</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0018.tlg001:254" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">254</biblScope> </bibl>: metaph., <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἡδονῶν</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0018.tlg001:115" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">115</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
